purpose: Local shallow-relief story elements for eight MUSE hero artworks

provenance.generationMethod: Deterministic local Three.js geometry authored by this repository script
provenance.historicalStatus: Visual reenactments are interpretive and not historical testimony

runtimeContract.animation: Runtime procedural timelines; GLB files contain static authored geometry

files.title: Water and Footfall
files.concept: Layered water ripples and a stepping shoe emerge from the painted river surface.

files.title: Runaway Yarn
files.concept: A wound crimson yarn ball and loose strand roll forward from the portrait plane.

files.title: Water Lily Reflection
files.concept: Water-lily pads, blossoms, and reflected ripples rise in shallow luminous layers.

files.title: Apple and Fold
files.concept: Cezanne-like fruit advances over a warped tablecloth that refuses one perspective.

files.title: Bedroom Chair
files.concept: A compact painted chair and tilted floor unfold beyond the bedroom frame.

files.title: Pointillist Monkey
files.concept: A monkey silhouette assembles from colored points above a calm concentric ripple.

files.title: Newsprint and Petals
files.concept: Folded newsprint opens outward while flowers and loose petals cross its edge.

files.title: Abstract Color Wave
files.concept: Kandinsky-like arcs, discs, and color lines surge out as a spatial composition.
